mapper.sql: pgao.id, pgao.permission_group_id, pgao.authorized_object_id, pgao.object_type, pgao.effective_at, pgao.expires_at, pgao.create_by, pgao.create_time, pgao.update_by, pgao.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT pgao.id, pgao.authorized_object_id, pgao.object_type, CASE pgao.object_type WHEN 'user' THEN '用户' WHEN 'org' THEN '组织' WHEN 'station' THEN '驻地' WHEN 'position' THEN '岗位' ELSE pgao.object_type END AS object_type_name, pgao.authorized_object_id AS object_id, CASE pgao.object_type WHEN 'user' THEN (SELECT u.user_name FROM po_users u WHERE u.user_id = pgao.authorized_object_id) WHEN 'org' THEN (SELECT o.org_name FROM po_organization o WHERE o.org_id = pgao.authorized_object_id) ELSE NULL END AS object_name, pgao.effective_at, pgao.expires_at, pgao.create_time, pgao.create_by FROM permission_group_authorized_objects pgao WHERE pgao.permission_group_id = #{permissionGroupId} ORDER BY pgao.create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO permission_group_authorized_objects (id, permission_group_id, authorized_object_id, object_type, effective_at, expires_at, create_by, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.permissionGroupId}, #{item.authorizedObjectId}, #{item.objectType}, #{item.effectiveAt}, #{item.expiresAt}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id AS user_id, u.user_code AS user_code, u.user_name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, u.phone AS user_phone, o.org_name AS org_name, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM authorized_object_data_permissions aodp WHERE aodp.permission_group_id = #{query.permissionGroupId} AND aodp.user_id = u.user_id AND aodp.status = 'active' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasExtPer FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id AS user_id FROM permission_group_authorized_objects pgao INNER JOIN po_users u ON ( pgao.object_type = 'user' AND pgao.authorized_object_id = u.user_id ) WHERE pgao.permission_group_id = #{query.permissionGroupId} AND u.state != 'X'
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id AS user_id FROM permission_group_authorized_objects pgao INNER JOIN po_organization org_auth ON pgao.authorized_object_id = org_auth.org_id AND pgao.object_type = 'org' INNER JOIN po_users_organization uo ON uo.org_id = org_auth.org_id INNER JOIN po_users u ON u.user_id = uo.user_id WHERE pgao.permission_group_id = #{query.permissionGroupId} AND u.state != 'X'
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id AS user_id FROM permission_group_authorized_objects pgao INNER JOIN po_position pos ON pgao.authorized_object_id = pos.position_id AND pgao.object_type = 'position' INNER JOIN po_users_organization uo ON uo.position_id = pos.position_id INNER JOIN po_users u ON u.user_id = uo.user_id WHERE pgao.permission_group_id = #{query.permissionGroupId} AND u.state != 'X' ) authorized_users INNER JOIN po_users u ON authorized_users.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN po_users_organization uo ON u.user_id = uo.user_id LEFT JOIN po_organization o ON uo.org_id = o.org_id
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM permission_group_excluded_objects pgeo WHERE pgeo.permission_group_id = #{query.permissionGroupId} AND pgeo.object_type = 'user' AND pgeo.excluded_object_id = u.user_id )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM permission_group_excluded_objects pgeo WHERE pgeo.permission_group_id = #{query.permissionGroupId} AND pgeo.object_type = 'org' AND pgeo.excluded_object_id = uo.org_id )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM permission_group_excluded_objects pgeo WHERE pgeo.permission_group_id = #{query.permissionGroupId} AND pgeo.object_type = 'position' AND pgeo.excluded_object_id = uo.position_id )
AND u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userName}, '%')
AND u.user_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userCode}, '%')
AND uo.org_id = #{query.orgId}
ORDER BY u.user_name ASC
